package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_select_slice_unbounded: Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag sqlx Select into slices without LIMIT or streaming for large tables.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule537PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario537Positive(records []Rule537PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
